{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Archmage’s Tower
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archmage’s Tower]] is located in the [[Fractured Realms]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
